Class UtilitiesConstant

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.UtilitiesConstant
public final class UtilitiesConstant extends Object
Compile-time constants shared across the Mesos server model. All values relate to market sizing and food rewards for different player counts.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    FIVE_PLAYER_BOTTOM_CARD
    Number of cards in the bottom market row for a 5-player game.
    static final int
    FIVE_PLAYER_TOP_CARD
    Number of cards in the top market row for a 5-player game.
    static final int
    FOOD_OFFERTILE_A
    Food granted to a player who places their totem on offer tile A (no card draws).
    static final int
    FOUR_PLAYER_BOTTOM_CARD
    Number of cards in the bottom market row for a 4-player game.
    static final int
    FOUR_PLAYER_TOP_CARD
    Number of cards in the top market row for a 4-player game.
    static final int
    NETWORK_CALLBACK_MAX_RETRIES
    Maximum number of times a server-to-client notification is retried before the player is declared disconnected.
    static final int
    NETWORK_CALLBACK_RETRY_DELAY_MS
    Milliseconds to wait between consecutive retry attempts for a failed server-to-client notification, giving transient network issues time to resolve.
    static final List<Integer>
    SCORE_FIVE_PLAYERS
    Bonus points awarded by final ranking position in a 5-player game (1st place, 2nd place, 3rd place, 4th place, 5th place).
    static final List<Integer>
    SCORE_FOUR_PLAYERS
    Bonus points awarded by final ranking position in a 4-player game (1st place, 2nd place, 3rd place, 4th place).
    static final List<Integer>
    SCORE_THREE_PLAYERS
    Bonus points awarded by final ranking position in a 3-player game (1st place, 2nd place, 3rd place).
    static final List<Integer>
    SCORE_TWO_PLAYERS
    Bonus points awarded by final ranking position in a 2-player game (1st place, 2nd place).
    static final int
    THREE_PLAYER_BOTTOM_CARD
    Number of cards in the bottom market row for a 3-player game.
    static final int
    THREE_PLAYER_TOP_CARD
    Number of cards in the top market row for a 3-player game.
    static final int
    TWO_PLAYER_BOTTOM_CARD
    Number of cards in the bottom market row for a 2-player game.
    static final int
    TWO_PLAYER_TOP_CARD
    Number of cards in the top market row for a 2-player game.

      public static final List<Integer> SCORE_FIVE_PLAYERS

    • NETWORK_CALLBACK_MAX_RETRIES

      public static final int NETWORK_CALLBACK_MAX_RETRIES
      Maximum number of times a server-to-client notification is retried before the player is declared disconnected. Covers both RMI callbacks and Socket proxies.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • NETWORK_CALLBACK_RETRY_DELAY_MS

      public static final int NETWORK_CALLBACK_RETRY_DELAY_MS
      Milliseconds to wait between consecutive retry attempts for a failed server-to-client notification, giving transient network issues time to resolve.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
